Through experiments across 3 separate tasks and correctness metrics, as well as 14 different models of various sizes, we find that fine-grained confidence scores consistently achieve lower calibration error across a broader range of probability intervals, and this effect is further amplified when global Platt-scaling is applied. Our proposed approaches offer a practical solution to eliciting well-calibrated confidence scores, enabling more trustworthy and streamlined usage of imperfect models in ACR tasks.
title_zh: 大模型在自动化代码修订中置信度校准的细粒度方法
abstract_zh: 在当今人工智能辅助的软件工程环境中，开发者越来越依赖于功能强大但本质上不完美的大型语言模型（LLMs）。这些模型产生错误输出的倾向会降低开发者的生产力。为此，一种经典的缓解方法是提供经过校准的置信度分数，以真实反映每个实例下模型输出正确的可能性。这类信息使用户能够立即决定是否接受输出、回避易出错的结果，并更准确地匹配自身期望与模型的实际能力。由于经过微调的LLM本身不会生成具有良好校准性的置信度分数，研究人员已开发出多种后处理校准方法。其中，对序列级置信度分数进行全局Platt校准在许多生成式软件工程任务中已被证明有效，但在自动化代码修订（ACR）任务——如程序修复、漏洞修复和代码优化——中仍存在不可靠或未被充分探索的问题。我们假设，传统方法采用粗粒度校准方式，难以适应ACR任务的需求，因为此类任务的正确性往往取决于局部修改决策，且偏差可能具有样本依赖性，因此需要更细粒度的置信度校准。为解决这一问题，本研究提出分别针对三种不同细粒度置信度分数实施局部Platt校准。通过在三个独立任务、多种正确性评估指标以及14种不同规模的模型上开展实验，我们发现细粒度置信度分数在更广泛的概率区间内始终表现出更低的校准误差，而当结合全局Platt校准时，该优势进一步增强。所提出的方案为获取良好校准的置信度分数提供了切实可行的解决方案，有助于提升不完美模型在ACR任务中的可信度与使用效率，推动其更加可靠、高效的应用。

title: Foundry: Template-Based CUDA Graph Context Materialization for Fast LLM Serving Cold Start
authors: Xueshen Liu, Yongji Wu, Yuncheng Yao, Danyang Zhuo, Ion Stoica, Z. Morley Mao
abstract: Modern LLM service providers increasingly rely on autoscaling and parallelism reconfiguration to respond to rapidly changing workloads, but cold-start latency remains a major bottleneck. While recent systems have reduced model weight loading to seconds, CUDA graph capture still takes tens of seconds to minutes and often dominates startup. Unfortunately, CUDA graphs cannot be naively serialized: beyond graph topology, they are tightly coupled to execution context, including device addresses embedded in kernel arguments and kernel code lazily loaded during warmup. Existing approaches either rely on brittle kernel-specific patching or heavyweight process-level checkpoint/restore that are inflexible to dynamic parallelism switching. We present Foundry, a template-based CUDA graph context materialization system that persists both graph topology and execution context during an offline processing stage, and reconstructs executable graphs online with negligible overhead. Foundry enforces deterministic memory layouts, automatically extracts and reloads kernel binaries required by captured graphs, and reduces online reconstruction costs through topology-based templating. For distributed serving, Foundry further enables a single-GPU offline capture to generate templates for multi-GPU deployments by patching only rank-dependent communication state. Across dense and MoE models up to 235B parameters, Foundry reduces cold-start latency by up to 99%, cutting the initialization time of Qwen3-235B-A22B from 10 minutes to 3.9 seconds while preserving the throughput gains of CUDA graphs.
title_zh: 铸造厂：基于模板的CUDA图上下文材料化，实现快速大语言模型服务冷启动
abstract_zh:
现代大型语言模型（LLM）服务提供商越来越多地依赖自动扩缩容和并行性配置的动态调整来应对快速变化的工作负载，但冷启动延迟仍然是一个主要瓶颈。尽管近期系统已将模型权重加载时间缩短至秒级，CUDA 图捕获仍需数十秒甚至数分钟，且通常成为启动过程中的主要耗时环节。遗憾的是，CUDA 图无法简单地进行序列化：除了图的拓扑结构外，它们还与执行上下文紧密耦合，包括内核参数中嵌入的设备地址，以及在预热阶段才懒加载的内核代码。现有方法要么依赖脆弱的特定内核修补机制，要么采用开销巨大的进程级检查点/恢复方案，难以灵活支持动态并行性的切换。

我们提出了 Foundry——一种基于模板的 CUDA 图上下文实例化系统。该系统在离线处理阶段持久化保存图的拓扑结构与执行上下文，并在线上重建可执行图时仅引入极低开销。Foundry 通过强制确定性内存布局，自动提取并重新加载捕获图所需的内核二进制文件，并通过基于拓扑的模板化技术显著降低在线重建成本。对于分布式推理场景，Foundry 还支持仅用单 GPU 离线捕获生成适用于多 GPU 部署的模板，仅需对与 rank 相关的通信状态进行少量补丁即可完成适配。

在高达 2350 亿参数的密集模型和 MoE 模型上，Foundry 将冷启动延迟最高降低了 99%。以 Qwen3-235B-A22B 为例，其初始化时间从 10 分钟缩短至 3.9 秒，同时完整保留了 CUDA 图带来的吞吐量提升优势。

title: DiffuMask: Diffusion Language Model for Token-level Prompt Pruning
authors: Caleb Zheng, Jyotika Singh, Fang Tu, Weiyi Sun, Sujeeth Bharadwaj, Yassine Benajiba, Sujith Ravi, Eli Shlizerman, Dan Roth
abstract: In-Context Learning and Chain-of-Thought prompting improve reasoning in large language models (LLMs). These typically come at the cost of longer, more expensive prompts that may contain redundant information. Prompt compression based on pruning offers a practical solution, yet existing methods rely on sequential token removal which is computationally intensive. We present DiffuMask, a diffusion-based framework integrating hierarchical shot-level and token-level pruning signals, that enables rapid and parallel prompt pruning via iterative mask prediction. DiffuMask substantially accelerates the compression process via masking multiple tokens in each denoising step. It offers tunable control over retained content, preserving essential reasoning context and achieving up to 80\% prompt length reduction. Meanwhile, it maintains or improves accuracy across in-domain, out-of-domain, and cross-model settings. Our results show that DiffuMask provides a generalizable and controllable framework for prompt compression, facilitating faster and more reliable in-context reasoning in LLMs.
title_zh: DiffuMask：用于标记级提示剪枝的扩散语言模型
abstract_zh: 上下文学习（In-Context Learning）与思维链提示（Chain-of-Thought Prompting）能够有效提升大型语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力。然而，这些方法通常需要更长、成本更高的提示，且可能包含冗余信息。基于剪枝的提示压缩提供了一种实用的解决方案，但现有方法依赖于逐个移除标记（token），计算开销较大。我们提出 DiffuMask——一种基于扩散模型的框架，融合了层级化的样本级（shot-level）与标记级（token-level）剪枝信号，通过迭代掩码预测实现快速、并行的提示剪枝。DiffuMask 在每个去噪步骤中可同时掩码多个标记，显著加速压缩过程。该方法支持灵活控制保留内容，有效保留关键推理上下文，实现最高达80%的提示长度缩减。同时，在领域内、领域外及跨模型等多种场景下，其性能保持稳定甚至有所提升。实验结果表明，DiffuMask 为提示压缩提供了一个通用且可控的框架，有助于实现大型语言模型中更快、更可靠的上下文推理。

title: PoC-Adapt: Semantic-Aware Automated Vulnerability Reproduction with LLM Multi-Agents and Reinforcement Learning-Driven Adaptive Policy
authors: Phan The Duy, Nguyen Viet Duy, Khoa Ngo-Khanh, Nguyen Huu Quyen, Van-Hau Pham
abstract: While recent approaches leverage large language models (LLMs) and multi-agent pipelines to automatically generate proof-of-concept (PoC) exploits from vulnerability reports, existing systems often suffer from two fundamental limitations: unreliable validation based on surface-level execution signals and high operational cost caused by extensive trial-and-error during exploit generation. In this paper, we present PoC-Adapt, an end-to-end framework for automated PoC generation and verification, architected upon a foundation semantic runtime validation and adaptive policy learning. At the core of PoC-Adapt is a Semantic Oracle that validates exploits by comparing structured pre- and post-execution system states, enabling reliable distinction between true vulnerability exploitation and incidental behavioral changes. To reduce exploration cost, we further introduce an Adaptive Policy Learning mechanism that learns an exploitation policy over semantic states and actions, guiding the exploit agent toward effective strategies with fewer failed attempts. PoC-Adapt is implemented as a multi-agent system comprising specialized agents for root cause analysis, environment building, exploit generation, and semantic validation, coordinated through structured feedback loops. Experimenting on the CWE-Bench-Java and PrimeVul benchmarks shows that PoC-Adapt significantly improves verification reliability by 25% and reduces exploit generation cost compared to prior LLM-based systems, highlighting the importance of semantic validation and learned action policies in automated vulnerability reproduction. Applied to the latest CVE corpus, PoC-Adapt confirmed 12 verified PoC out of 80 reproduce attempts at a cost of $0.42 per generated exploit
title_zh: PoC-Adapt：基于语义感知的LLM多智能体与强化学习驱动自适应策略的自动化漏洞复现
abstract_zh: 尽管近期方法利用大型语言模型（LLMs）和多智能体流水线，能够从漏洞报告中自动生成概念验证（PoC）攻击代码，但现有系统通常存在两个根本性局限：基于表面执行信号的不可靠验证，以及在生成攻击过程中因大量试错而导致的高操作成本。本文提出 PoC-Adapt，一个端到端的自动化 PoC 生成与验证框架，其架构基于基础性的语义运行时验证与自适应策略学习。PoC-Adapt 的核心是一个语义探针（Semantic Oracle），通过对比程序执行前后的结构化系统状态来验证攻击的有效性，从而可靠地区分真正的漏洞利用与偶然的行为变化。为降低探索成本，我们进一步引入了自适应策略学习机制，该机制在语义状态与动作空间上学习攻击策略，使攻击智能体能够以更少的失败尝试快速导向有效的攻击路径。PoC-Adapt 被实现为一个多智能体系统，包含负责根因分析、环境构建、攻击生成和语义验证的专用智能体，并通过结构化的反馈回路进行协同。在 CWE-Bench-Java 和 PrimeVul 基准测试上的实验表明，PoC-Adapt 将验证可靠性提升了 25%，同时显著降低了攻击生成成本，相较于以往基于 LLM 的系统，凸显了语义验证与学习型动作策略在自动化漏洞复现中的关键作用。将该框架应用于最新的 CVE 数据库，PoC-Adapt 在 80 次可复现尝试中成功确认了 12 个经过验证的 PoC，平均每个生成的 PoC 成本仅为 0.42 美元。

title: CoverAssert: Iterative LLM Assertion Generation Driven by Functional Coverage via Syntax-Semantic Representations
authors: Yonghao Wang, Yang Yin, Hongqin Lyu, Jiaxin Zhou, Zhiteng Chao, Mingyu Shi, Wenchao Ding, Yunlin Du, Jing Ye, Tiancheng Wang, Huawei Li
abstract: LLMs can generate SystemVerilog assertions (SVAs) from natural language specs, but single-pass outputs often lack functional coverage due to limited IC design understanding. We propose CoverAssert, an iterative framework that clusters semantic and AST-based structural features of assertions, maps them to specifications, and uses functional coverage feedback to guide LLMs in prioritizing uncovered points. Experiments on four open-source designs show that integrating CoverAssert with AssertLLM and Spec2Assertion improves average improvements of 9.57 % in branch coverage, 9.64 % in statement coverage, and 15.69 % in toggle coverage.
title_zh: CoverAssert：基于语法-语义表示的函数覆盖率驱动的迭代式大语言模型断言生成
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）能够从自然语言规范生成SystemVerilog断言（SVAs），但单次生成的输出往往因对集成电路设计理解有限，导致功能覆盖率不足。为此，我们提出了CoverAssert，一种迭代式框架：该框架通过聚类断言的语义特征和基于抽象语法树（AST）的结构特征，将其与规范进行映射，并利用功能覆盖率反馈引导LLM优先关注未覆盖的点。在四个开源设计上的实验表明，将CoverAssert与AssertLLM及Spec2Assertion结合后，分支覆盖率平均提升9.57%，语句覆盖率平均提升9.64%，翻转覆盖率平均提升15.69%。

title: SkillSieve: A Hierarchical Triage Framework for Detecting Malicious AI Agent Skills
authors: Yinghan Hou, Zongyou Yang
abstract: OpenClaw's ClawHub marketplace hosts over 13,000 community-contributed agent skills, and between 13% and 26% of them contain security vulnerabilities according to recent audits. Regex scanners miss obfuscated payloads; formal static analyzers cannot read the natural language instructions in SKILL.md files where prompt injection and social engineering attacks hide. Neither approach handles both modalities. SkillSieve is a three-layer detection framework that applies progressively deeper analysis only where needed. Layer 1 runs regex, AST, and metadata checks through an XGBoost-based feature scorer, filtering roughly 86% of benign skills in under 40ms on average at zero API cost. Layer 2 sends suspicious skills to an LLM, but instead of asking one broad question, it splits the analysis into four parallel sub-tasks (intent alignment, permission justification, covert behavior detection, cross-file consistency), each with its own prompt and structured output. Layer 3 puts high-risk skills before a jury of three different LLMs that vote independently and, if they disagree, debate before reaching a verdict. We evaluate on 49,592 real ClawHub skills and adversarial samples across five evasion techniques, running the full pipeline on a 440 ARM single-board computer. On a 400-skill labeled benchmark, SkillSieve achieves 0.800 F1, outperforming ClawVet's 0.421, at an average cost of 0.006 per skill. Code, data, and benchmark are open-sourced.
title_zh: SkillSieve：一种用于检测恶意AI代理技能的分层筛选框架
abstract_zh: OpenClaw的ClawHub市场拥有超过13,000个由社区贡献的智能体技能，根据最近的审计结果，其中13%至26%存在安全漏洞。正则表达式扫描器无法识别经过混淆的攻击载荷；形式化静态分析工具也无法解析SKILL.md文件中以自然语言编写的指令，而这些指令正是提示注入和社交工程攻击藏身之处。这两种方法均无法同时处理代码与自然语言两种模态。SkillSieve是一种三层检测框架，仅在必要时才应用逐层深入的分析。第一层通过基于XGBoost的特征评分器，运行正则表达式、抽象语法树（AST）和元数据检查，在平均不到40毫秒内过滤掉约86%的良性技能，且无需任何API开销。第二层将可疑技能发送给大语言模型（LLM），但并非提出一个宽泛的问题，而是将其拆分为四个并行子任务：意图一致性、权限合理性、隐蔽行为检测以及跨文件一致性，每个任务都有独立的提示和结构化输出。第三层将高风险技能提交给由三名不同LLM组成的“评审团”，它们独立投票，若意见不一致，则进行辩论，最终达成裁决。我们在49,592个真实的ClawHub技能及五种逃避技术生成的对抗样本上进行了评估，并在一块440 ARM单板计算机上运行了完整检测流程。在包含400个标注技能的基准测试中，SkillSieve实现了0.800的F1分数，显著优于ClawVet的0.421，且每项技能的平均成本仅为0.006。相关代码、数据集和基准测试均已开源。

title: How Much LLM Does a Self-Revising Agent Actually Need?
authors: Seongwoo Jeong, Seonil Son
abstract: Recent LLM-based agents often place world modeling, planning, and reflection inside a single language model loop. This can produce capable behavior, but it makes a basic scientific question difficult to answer: which part of the agent's competence actually comes from the LLM, and which part comes from explicit structure around it? We study this question not by claiming a general answer, but by making it empirically tractable. We introduce a declared reflective runtime protocol that externalizes agent state, confidence signals, guarded actions, and hypothetical transitions into inspectable runtime structure. We instantiate this protocol in a declarative runtime and evaluate it on noisy Collaborative Battleship [4] using four progressively structured agents over 54 games (18 boards $\times$ 3 seeds). The resulting decomposition isolates four components: posterior belief tracking, explicit world-model planning, symbolic in-episode reflection, and sparse LLM-based revision. Across this decomposition, explicit world-model planning improves substantially over a greedy posterior-following baseline (+24.1pp win rate, +0.017 F1). Symbolic reflection operates as a real runtime mechanism -- with prediction tracking, confidence gating, and guarded revision actions -- even though its current revision presets are not yet net-positive in aggregate. Adding conditional LLM revision at about 4.3\% of turns yields only a small and non-monotonic change: average F1 rises slightly (+0.005) while win rate drops (31$\rightarrow$29 out of 54). These results suggest a methodological contribution rather than a leaderboard claim: externalizing reflection turns otherwise latent agent behavior into inspectable runtime structure, allowing the marginal role of LLM intervention to be studied directly.
title_zh: 一个自我修订的智能体实际上需要多少大语言模型？
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体常常将世界建模、规划与反思等功能整合进单一的语言模型循环中。这种方法虽能产生较强的行为能力，却使得一个基本的科学问题难以回答：智能体的哪些能力真正来源于LLM本身，又有哪些来自其外部显式结构的支持？我们并未试图给出一个普适性答案，而是致力于使这一问题在实证层面变得可研究。为此，我们提出了一种声明式的反思运行时协议，将智能体的状态、置信度信号、受保护的动作以及假设性状态转移等要素外化为可检查的运行时结构。我们在一个声明式运行时环境中实现了该协议，并在噪声环境下的协作战舰游戏（Noisy Collaborative Battleship [4]）中，对四种逐步增强结构的智能体进行了评估，共完成54场游戏（18个棋盘 × 3个随机种子）。由此得到的分解结果识别出四个核心组件：后验信念追踪、显式世界模型规划、符号化回合内反思，以及稀疏的LLM驱动修订。在这一分解框架下，显式世界模型规划相较于仅盲目追随后验分布的基线，显著提升了性能（胜率提高24.1个百分点，F1得分提升0.017）。符号化反思作为实际的运行时机制发挥了作用——具备预测跟踪、置信度门控和受保护的修订动作等特征，尽管当前预设的修订策略整体上尚未带来净收益。在约4.3%的回合中引入条件性LLM修订，仅带来微小且非单调的变化：平均F1略有上升（+0.005），但胜率反而下降（从54场中的31场降至29场）。这些结果表明，我们的贡献更在于方法论层面而非排行榜上的领先：通过将反思过程外化，原本隐含的智能体行为得以转化为可观测的运行时结构，从而能够直接研究LLM干预的边际作用。

title: Workmanship of Learning: Embedding Craftsmanship Values in AI-Integrated Educational Tools
authors: Tuan-Ting Huang, Janet Yi-Ching Huang, Stephan Wensveen
abstract: Generative AI's emphasis on automation and efficiency challenges design education, where learning is grounded in exploration, reflection, and responsibility. This work introduces AI Craftsmanship, a value-oriented framework drawing on craftsmanship traditions that emphasize risk, rhythm, and care as central to learning through making. Through a Research through Design (RtD) approach, we designed an AI-integrated creative coding tool embedding these values into interactions and interface rather than outcomes. The tool supports designers learning generative pattern-making with p5.js by constraining AI, encouraging iterative experimentation, and foregrounding reflection. We studied the tool with five design practitioners through one-hour sessions and semi-structured interviews. Findings show craft values manifest unevenly: risk and rhythm shape early sense-making, while care emerges through reflective practices. Emergent values -- such as aesthetic judgment and confidence -- also motivated learning. AI Craftsmanship mediates values, tools, and materials, offering a value-driven perspective on designing AI systems for reflective, responsible, craft-informed learning in design education.
title_zh: 学习的匠心：在AI融合教育工具中融入工匠精神价值
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能对自动化与效率的强调，挑战了设计教育中以探索、反思和责任为基础的学习模式。本文提出“AI工艺学”（AI Craftsmanship）这一价值导向的框架，借鉴传统工艺学中的理念，将风险、节奏与关怀视为通过实践学习的核心要素。通过设计研究（Research through Design, RtD）方法，我们开发了一款融合AI的创意编程工具，将这些价值观融入交互与界面设计，而非仅仅关注最终成果。该工具通过限制AI能力、鼓励迭代实验以及突出反思过程，支持设计师使用p5.js学习生成式图案创作。我们通过对五位设计实践者开展为期一小时的访谈与工作坊，验证了该工具的有效性。研究发现，工艺价值的体现并不均衡：风险与节奏在早期理解阶段发挥关键作用，而关怀则通过反思性实践逐渐显现。此外，一些涌现的价值——如审美判断力与自信心——也显著推动了学习进程。AI工艺学在价值观、工具与材料之间架起桥梁，为设计教育中面向反思性、负责任且以工艺精神为导向的AI系统设计提供了价值驱动的新视角。

title: Production-Ready Automated ECU Calibration using Residual Reinforcement Learning
authors: Andreas Kampmeier, Kevin Badalian, Lucas Koch, Sung-Yong Lee, Jakob Andert
abstract: Electronic Control Units (ECUs) have played a pivotal role in transforming motorcars of yore into the modern vehicles we see on our roads today. They actively regulate the actuation of individual components and thus determine the characteristics of the whole system. In this, the behavior of the control functions heavily depends on their calibration parameters which engineers traditionally design by hand. This is taking place in an environment of rising customer expectations and steadily shorter product development cycles. At the same time, legislative requirements are increasing while emission standards are getting stricter. Considering the number of vehicle variants on top of all that, the conventional method is losing its practical and financial viability. Prior work has already demonstrated that optimal control functions can be automatically developed with reinforcement learning (RL); since the resulting functions are represented by artificial neural networks, they lack explainability, a circumstance which renders them challenging to employ in production vehicles. In this article, we present an explainable approach to automating the calibration process using residual RL which follows established automotive development principles. Its applicability is demonstrated by means of a map-based air path controller in a series control unit using a hardware-in-the-loop (HiL) platform. Starting with a sub-optimal map, the proposed methodology quickly converges to a calibration which closely resembles the reference in the series ECU. The results prove that the approach is suitable for the industry where it leads to better calibrations in significantly less time and requires virtually no human intervention
title_zh: 基于残差强化学习的生产就绪自动化ECU标定
abstract_zh: 电子控制单元（ECUs）在将昔日的汽车转变为如今我们道路上所见的现代车辆方面发挥了关键作用。它们主动调节各个部件的执行，从而决定了整个系统的行为特性。在这一过程中，控制功能的表现高度依赖于其校准参数，而这些参数长期以来一直由工程师手动设计。然而，当前客户期望不断上升，产品开发周期却日益缩短；与此同时，法规要求不断增加，排放标准也日趋严格。考虑到车型变体数量的持续增长，传统的手工校准方法正逐渐失去其实际和经济上的可行性。以往的研究已证明，通过强化学习（RL）可以自动开发出最优的控制函数；但由于生成的函数以人工神经网络的形式表示，缺乏可解释性，这使得它们难以应用于量产车辆中。本文提出了一种可解释的自动化校准方法，采用残差强化学习（residual RL），遵循成熟的汽车开发原则。该方法的有效性通过基于映射的空气路径控制器在系列ECU上的硬件在环（HiL）平台进行了验证。从一个次优的控制映射出发，所提出的方法能够快速收敛至与系列ECU参考校准非常接近的结果。实验结果表明，该方法适用于工业应用，能够在显著更短的时间内实现更优的校准，且几乎无需人工干预。

title: Predicate Subtypes in VerCors
authors: Tycho Dubbeling, Marieke Huisman, Ömer Şakar
abstract: Predicate subtypes provide an attractive mechanism to specify range constraints on variable declarations. This paper discusses how we add support for predicate subtypes to the VerCors program verifier. Our approach automatically generates appropriate specifications from predicate subtype declarations. It provides support to easily combine multiple subtypes for a single variable declaration. Moreover, in order to use predicate subtypes for overflow checking, a special strict mode is introduced, where every subexpression also has to stay within the declared subtype. A prototype implementation is integrated into the VerCors verifier.
title_zh: VerCors中的谓词子类型
abstract_zh: 谓词子类型提供了一种吸引人的机制，用于指定变量声明的取值范围约束。本文讨论了如何向VerCors程序验证器添加对谓词子类型的支援。我们的方法能够自动从谓词子类型声明中生成适当的规范。该方法支持轻松地将多个子类型组合应用于单个变量声明。此外，为了利用谓词子类型进行溢出检查，引入了一种特殊的严格模式，在该模式下，每个子表达式也必须保持在所声明的子类型范围内。一个原型实现已集成到VerCors验证器中。

title: Babbling Suppression: Making LLMs Greener One Token at a Time
authors: Lola Solovyeva, Fernando Castor
abstract: Context: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in modern software development, aiding in code generation, code completion, and refactoring through AI-powered assistants. While they accelerate development workflows, they often produce extraneous output, referred to as "babbling", which incurs additional cognitive, economic, and energy costs. Objective: This work investigates the problem of babbling in LLM-based code generation and proposes a practical, model-agnostic approach to reduce unnecessary output without compromising solution accuracy. Method: We introduce Babbling Suppression (BS), a method that integrates test execution into the LLM generation process by evaluating intermediate outputs and terminating generation once a solution passes all tests. This prevents excessive token generation while having no impact on model accuracy. An empirical study was conducted across two Python and two Java benchmarks, targeting four 3-4B parameter models and six 6-7B parameter models. Results: Our findings show that babbling occurs across all tested models, with higher frequency in Java than in Python. Applying BS significantly reduces energy consumption by up to 65% for Python and 62% for Java in models prone to babbling. Across 40 model-benchmark pairs, 29 showed reduced mean energy consumption, with reductions exceeding 20% in 22 cases. Generated token count decreased in 35 pairs, while the GPU energy-per-token overhead of BS remained below 10% for 26 pairs, decreased for 2, and reached a maximum of 24%, yielding net energy savings in most cases. Implications: BS can make AI-assisted programming more efficient and sustainable by reducing energy consumption and minimizing cognitive effort by developers. Its model-agnostic design allows easy integration, suggesting broad applicability.
title_zh: 喋喋不休抑制：逐个标记让大语言模型更绿色
abstract_zh:
上下文：大型语言模型（LLMs）在现代软件开发中的应用日益广泛，通过人工智能驱动的助手辅助代码生成、代码补全和重构。尽管它们能够加速开发流程，但常常会产生冗余输出，这种现象被称为“胡言乱语”（babbling），从而带来额外的认知成本、经济成本和能源消耗。  
目标：本文研究了基于LLM的代码生成中“胡言乱语”问题，并提出一种实用且与模型无关的方法，以减少不必要的输出，同时不损害解决方案的准确性。  
方法：我们提出了“胡言乱语抑制”（Babbling Suppression, BS）方法，该方法将测试执行融入LLM生成过程，通过评估中间输出，在检测到某个解通过所有测试后立即终止生成。这一机制可有效防止过度生成token，且对模型准确性无任何影响。我们在两个Python和两个Java基准测试上进行了实证研究，涵盖四款3-4B参数规模的模型和六款6-7B参数规模的模型。  
结果：研究发现，所有测试模型均存在胡言乱语现象，其中Java模型的出现频率高于Python模型。应用BS方法后，对于易产生胡言乱语的模型，Python和Java的能耗分别最高降低65%和62%。在40个模型-基准组合中，29个显示出平均能耗下降，其中22个降幅超过20%。生成的token数量在35组中减少，而BS的GPU每token能耗开销在26组中低于10%，在2组中进一步降低，最大值为24%，大多数情况下仍实现净能耗节省。  
意义：BS方法可通过降低能耗并减少开发者所需认知负担，使AI辅助编程更加高效和可持续。其与模型无关的设计使其易于集成，具有广泛的适用前景。

title: Select-then-Solve: Paradigm Routing as Inference-Time Optimization for LLM Agents
authors: Heng Zhou, Zelin Tan, Zhemeng Zhang, Yutao Fan, Yibing Lin, Li Kang, Xiufeng Song, Rui Li, Songtao Huang, Ao Yu, Yuchen Fan, Yanxu Chen, Kaixin Xu, Xiaohong Liu, Yiran Qin, Philip Torr, Chen Zhang, Zhenfei Yin
abstract: When an LLM-based agent improves on a task, is the gain from the model itself or from the reasoning paradigm wrapped around it? We study this question by comparing six inference-time paradigms, namely Direct, CoT, ReAct, Plan-Execute, Reflection, and ReCode, across four frontier LLMs and ten benchmarks, yielding roughly 18,000 runs. We find that reasoning structure helps dramatically on some tasks but hurts on others: ReAct improves over Direct by 44pp on GAIA, while CoT degrades performance by 15pp on HumanEval. No single paradigm dominates, and oracle per-task selection beats the best fixed paradigm by 17.1pp on average. Motivated by this complementarity, we propose a select-then-solve approach: before answering each task, a lightweight embedding-based router selects the most suitable paradigm. Across four models, the router improves average accuracy from 47.6% to 53.1%, outperforming the best fixed paradigm at 50.3% by 2.8pp and recovering up to 37% of the oracle gap. In contrast, zero-shot self-routing only works for GPT-5 at 67.1% and fails for weaker models, all trailing the learned router. Our results argue that reasoning paradigm selection should be a per-task decision made by a learned router, not a fixed architectural choice.
title_zh: 选择后求解：作为大语言模型代理推理时优化的范式路由
abstract_zh:
当基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体在某项任务上取得进步时，这种提升究竟来自模型本身，还是源于其背后的推理范式？为探究这一问题，我们对比了六种推理阶段的范式——直接生成（Direct）、思维链（CoT）、ReAct、计划-执行（Plan-Execute）、反思（Reflection）和ReCode——在四个前沿大语言模型与十个基准测试上的表现，共完成约18,000次实验。研究发现，推理结构在某些任务上能显著提升性能，但在另一些任务上反而造成损害：在GAIA基准上，ReAct相比Direct提升了44个百分点；而在HumanEval上，CoT却导致性能下降15个百分点。没有一种范式在所有任务中都占优，而针对每项任务进行最优范式选择（即“理想选择”）平均比表现最好的固定范式高出17.1个百分点。

基于这一互补性特征，我们提出一种“先选择、后求解”的新方法：在回答每个任务前，使用一个轻量级的基于嵌入的路由机制，自动选择最合适的推理范式。在四个模型上，该路由机制将平均准确率从47.6%提升至53.1%，优于表现最佳的固定范式（50.3%）2.8个百分点，并成功恢复了高达37%的理想选择差距。相比之下，零样本自路由仅在GPT-5上达到67.1%的准确率，对其他较弱模型则完全失效，且均落后于经过训练的路由机制。

我们的研究结果表明，推理范式的选取应作为一项针对具体任务的动态决策，由一个可学习的路由系统来完成，而非作为固定的架构设计。

title: ReCodeAgent: A Multi-Agent Workflow for Language-agnostic Translation and Validation of Large-scale Repositories
authors: Ali Reza Ibrahimzada, Brandon Paulsen, Daniel Kroening, Reyhaneh Jabbarvand
abstract: Most repository-level code translation and validation techniques have been evaluated on a single source-target programming language (PL) pair, owing to the complex engineering effort required to adapt new PL pairs. Programming agents can enable PL-agnosticism in repository-level code translation and validation: they can synthesize code across many PLs and autonomously use existing tools specific to each PL's analysis. However, state-of-the-art has yet to offer a fully autonomous agentic approach for repository-level code translation and validation of large-scale programs. This paper proposes ReCodeAgent, an autonomous multi-agent approach for language-agnostic repository-level code translation and validation. Users only need to provide the project in the source PL and specify the target PL for ReCodeAgent to automatically translate and validate the entire repository. ReCodeAgent is the first technique to achieve high translation success rates across many PLs. We compare the effectiveness of ReCodeAgent with four alternative neuro-symbolic and agentic approaches to translate 118 real-world projects, with 1,975 LoC and 43 translation units for each project, on average. The projects cover 6 PLs (C, Go, Java, JavaScript, Python, and Rust) and 4 PL pairs (C-Rust, Go-Rust, Java-Python, Python-JavaScript). Our results demonstrate that ReCodeAgent consistently outperforms prior techniques on translation correctness, improving test pass rate by 60.8% on ground-truth tests, with an average cost of $15.3. We also perform process-centric analysis of ReCodeAgent trajectories to confirm its procedural efficiency. Finally, we investigate how the design choices (a multi-agent vs. single-agent architecture) influence ReCodeAgent performance: on average, the test pass rate drops by 40.4%, and trajectories become 28% longer and persistently inefficient.
title_zh: ReCodeAgent：一种用于大规模代码库的跨语言翻译与验证的多智能体工作流
abstract_zh: 大多数仓库级代码翻译与验证技术都仅在单一源-目标编程语言（PL）对上进行了评估，这主要是由于适配新编程语言对所需复杂的工程工作量。编程智能体（programming agents）能够实现仓库级代码翻译与验证的编程语言无关性：它们可以跨多种编程语言自动生成代码，并自主使用针对每种编程语言分析的现有工具。然而，当前最先进的技术尚未提供一种完全自主的智能体方法来处理大规模程序的仓库级代码翻译与验证。本文提出 ReCodeAgent，这是一种面向语言无关性的自主多智能体方法，用于仓库级代码翻译与验证。用户只需提供源编程语言中的项目，并指定目标编程语言，ReCodeAgent 即可自动完成整个仓库的翻译与验证。ReCodeAgent 是首个在多种编程语言间实现高翻译成功率的技术。我们通过对比四种替代性的神经符号与智能体方法，对 118 个真实世界项目进行了评估，每个项目平均包含 1,975 行代码（LoC）和 43 个翻译单元。这些项目覆盖了六种编程语言（C、Go、Java、JavaScript、Python 和 Rust），以及四种编程语言对（C-Rust、Go-Rust、Java-Python、Python-JavaScript）。实验结果表明，ReCodeAgent 在翻译正确性方面始终优于先前技术，在真实测试用例中测试通过率提升了 60.8%，平均成本仅为 15.3 美元。我们还对 ReCodeAgent 的执行过程轨迹进行了以流程为中心的分析，验证了其过程效率。最后，我们研究了设计选择（多智能体 vs. 单智能体架构）对 ReCodeAgent 性能的影响：平均而言，测试通过率下降了 40.4%，轨迹长度增加了 28%，且持续表现出低效特征。

title: Syntax Is Easy, Semantics Is Hard: Evaluating LLMs for LTL Translation
authors: Priscilla Kyei Danso, Mohammad Saqib Hasan, Niranjan Balasubramanian, Omar Chowdhury
abstract: Propositional Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) is a popular formalism for specifying desirable requirements and security and privacy policies for software, networks, and systems. Yet expressing such requirements and policies in LTL remains challenging because of its intricate semantics. Since many security and privacy analysis tools require LTL formulas as input, this difficulty places them out of reach for many developers and analysts. Large Language Models (LLMs) could broaden access to such tools by translating natural language fragments into LTL formulas. This paper evaluates that premise by assessing how effectively several representative LLMs translate assertive English sentences into LTL formulas. Using both human-generated and synthetic ground-truth data, we evaluate effectiveness along syntactic and semantic dimensions. The results reveal three findings: (1) in line with prior findings, LLMs perform better on syntactic aspects of LTL than on semantic ones; (2) they generally benefit from more detailed prompts; and (3) reformulating the task as a Python code-completion problem substantially improves overall performance. We also discuss challenges in conducting a fair evaluation on this task and conclude with recommendations for future work.
title_zh: 语法很简单，语义很困难：评估大语言模型在LTL翻译中的表现
abstract_zh: 命题线性时序逻辑（LTL）是一种广泛用于描述软件、网络及系统中理想需求以及安全与隐私策略的正式化方法。然而，由于其复杂的语义结构，将这些需求和策略用LTL表达仍然具有挑战性。由于许多安全与隐私分析工具需要以LTL公式作为输入，这一困难使得这些工具对众多开发者和分析人员而言难以触及。大型语言模型（LLMs）有望通过将自然语言片段翻译为LTL公式，从而扩大对这类工具的可访问性。本文通过评估几种代表性LLMs在将陈述性英语句子转化为LTL公式方面的表现，检验了这一假设。我们采用人工生成和合成的真实数据，从语法和语义两个维度评估其有效性。研究结果揭示了三个发现：（1）与以往研究一致，LLMs在处理LTL的语法方面表现优于语义方面；（2）它们通常从更详细的提示（prompt）中获益更多；（3）将任务重新表述为Python代码补全问题，能显著提升整体性能。此外，我们还讨论了在此类任务上进行公平评估所面临的挑战，并对未来工作提出了建议。

title: Validated Intent Compilation for Constrained Routing in LEO Mega-Constellations
authors: Yuanhang Li
abstract: Operating LEO mega-constellations requires translating high-level operator intents ("reroute financial traffic away from polar links under 80 ms") into low-level routing constraints -- a task that demands both natural language understanding and network-domain expertise. We present an end-to-end system comprising three components: (1) a GNN cost-to-go router that distills Dijkstra-quality routing into a 152K-parameter graph attention network achieving 99.8% packet delivery ratio with 17x inference speedup; (2) an LLM intent compiler that converts natural language to a typed constraint intermediate representation using few-shot prompting with a verifier-feedback repair loop, achieving 98.4% compilation rate and 87.6% full semantic match on feasible intents in a 240-intent benchmark (193 feasible, 47 infeasible); and (3) an 8-pass deterministic validator with constructive feasibility certification that achieves 0% unsafe acceptance on all 47 infeasible intents (30 labeled + 17 discovered by Pass 8), with 100% corruption detection across 240 structural corruption tests and 100% on 15 targeted adversarial attacks. End-to-end evaluation across four constrained routing scenarios confirms zero constraint violations with both routers. We further demonstrate that apparent performance gaps in polar-avoidance scenarios are largely explained by topological reachability ceilings rather than routing quality, and that the LLM compiler outperforms a rule-based baseline by 46.2 percentage points on compositional intents. Our system bridges the semantic gap between operator intent and network configuration while maintaining the safety guarantees required for operational deployment.
title_zh: 低地球轨道巨型星座中受限路由的验证意图编译
abstract_zh: 运营低地球轨道（LEO）巨型星座需要将高层次的运营商意图（例如“在极地链路延迟低于80毫秒时，将金融流量重新路由”）转化为底层的路由约束——这一任务既要求具备自然语言理解能力，又需深厚的网络领域专业知识。我们提出一个端到端系统，包含三个核心组件：(1) 一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的“成本至终点”路由引擎，将Dijkstra算法级别的路由性能压缩为仅含15.2万参数的图注意力网络，在实现99.8%包交付率的同时，推理速度提升17倍；(2) 一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的意图编译器，通过少量示例提示（few-shot prompting）结合验证器反馈修复循环，将自然语言指令转换为带类型的约束中间表示，实现了98.4%的编译成功率，以及在240个意图的基准测试中对193个可行意图的87.6%完整语义匹配率（其中47个不可行）；(3) 一种八轮确定性验证器，具备构造性可行性认证能力，在全部47个不可行意图上实现0%的误接受率（其中30个为标注，17个由第8轮发现），并在240次结构破坏测试中实现100%的缺陷检测率，同时在15种针对性对抗攻击中也达到100%的检测率。在四个受限路由场景下的端到端评估表明，两种路由器均未出现任何约束违规。我们进一步证明，极地避让场景中看似存在的性能差距，主要源于拓扑可达性的理论上限，而非路由质量本身；此外，LLM编译器在复合型意图上的表现比基于规则的基线高出46.2个百分点。本系统有效弥合了运营商意图与网络配置之间的语义鸿沟，同时确保了实际部署所需的严格安全保障。

title: Benchmarking Requirement-to-Architecture Generation with Hybrid Evaluation
authors: Minxiao Li, Shuying Yan, Li Zhang, Yang Liu, Fang Liu
abstract: Recently, Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in automating software engineering tasks. Generating software architecture designs from requirement documents is a crucial step in software development. However, there is currently a lack of functional datasets tailored for this task. To bridge this gap, we introduce R2ABench (Requirement-To-Architecture Benchmark), a novel benchmark comprising diverse real-world software projects paired with comprehensive Product Requirements Documents (PRDs) and expert-curated PlantUML reference diagrams. Furthermore, we propose a multi-dimensional, hybrid evaluation framework that assesses generated diagrams across three complementary layers: Structural Graph Metrics, Multi-dimensional Scoring, and Architecture Anti-pattern Detection. Using this framework, we conducted a comprehensive empirical study evaluating state-of-the-art models and agentic workflows. Our study shows that LLMs show strong syntactic validity and robust entity extraction but fundamentally struggle with relational reasoning, leading to structurally fragmented architectures. Code-specialized models partially alleviate this limitation, while agent frameworks introduce significant instability rather than consistent improvements. R2ABench provides a robust and standardized foundation for advancing LLM-driven software architecture generation.
title_zh: 基于混合评估的需求到架构生成基准测试要求
abstract_zh: 最近，大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动化软件工程任务方面展现出巨大潜力。从需求文档生成软件架构设计是软件开发中的关键步骤。然而，目前尚缺乏针对该任务的功能性数据集。为填补这一空白，我们提出了R2ABench（需求到架构基准），这是一个全新的基准测试体系，包含多样化的实际软件项目，以及配套的完整产品需求文档（PRDs）和专家精心整理的PlantUML参考图示。此外，我们还提出了一种多维度、混合型评估框架，从三个互补层面评估生成的架构图：结构图度量、多维度评分以及架构反模式检测。利用该框架，我们开展了一项全面的实证研究，评估了当前最先进的模型及智能体工作流。研究结果表明，尽管LLMs在语法正确性和实体提取方面表现强劲，但在关系推理方面存在根本性缺陷，导致生成的架构结构碎片化。代码专用模型在一定程度上缓解了这一局限，而智能体框架则引入了显著的不稳定性，未能带来持续的性能提升。R2ABench为推动基于LLM的软件架构生成技术发展提供了坚实且标准化的基础。
